summary: Allow placing up to 3 independently-colored trains (red, blue, green) that animate simultaneously on connected track segments, with per-train car attachments and collision detection.

tasks.title: Refactor state from single train to trains array
tasks.description: Replace state.train (single object) and state.cars (single array) with state.trains: [{row, col, color, cars}]. Add helper functions getTrainAt(row,col), getTrainIndex(row,col), getTrainByColor(color). Add constants MAX_TRAINS=3, TRAIN_COLORS map, TRAIN_COLOR_ORDER.
acceptance: state.trains is an array supporting 0-3 train objects
Each train has {row, col, color, cars} properties
Helper functions correctly find trains by position or color

tasks.title: Add 3 colored train palette items
tasks.description: Replace single 'Loco' palette item with 3 colored trains: Red, Blue, Green. Each has data-type='train-red', 'train-blue', 'train-green' and distinct CSS border/background colors.
acceptance: 3 distinctly colored train items visible in sidebar palette
Each has appropriate color-coded border and background
Labels show 'Red', 'Blue', 'Green'

tasks.title: Parameterize createTrainSVG by color
tasks.description: Add color parameter to createTrainSVG(). Use TRAIN_COLORS map to set body, hood, cab, cowcatcher, running board, detail colors. Red preserves current look.
acceptance: Red train looks identical to current train
Blue and green trains are visually distinct with matching color schemes
Neutral elements (wheels, headlight, smokestack, windows) unchanged across colors

tasks.title: Update all core functions for multi-train
tasks.description: Update renderCell, placeTrain, removePiece, clearAll, handleRemoveCell, saveUndo, undo, getCarCellPositions(train), sortCarsWithCabooseEnd(train), renderStaticCars to work with trains array.
acceptance: Can place up to 3 trains on different track cells
Removing a cell with a train removes that specific train
Cars attach to specific train via drag-to-locomotive
Undo/redo preserves all trains state
Static car display works for all trains simultaneously

tasks.title: Update drag & drop for multi-train
tasks.description: Train dragging identifies specific train by color. Palette train-* items place the corresponding color. Cars drop onto any locomotive. Ghost preview uses correct train color.
acceptance: Dragging a placed train moves that specific train (preserves color)
Palette train items place the correct color
Relocating an existing color shows flash animation on old cell
Car drop targets any locomotive, attaches to that train
Ghost preview shows correct train color

tasks.title: Multi-train animation system
tasks.description: Replace single animState with animStates array. Each train gets independent animation state with trainEl, headlightEl, carEls, path, progress. animateFrame iterates all active trains. Smoke spawns for each train. Chug rhythm shared.
acceptance: All placed trains animate simultaneously when Play pressed
Each train follows its own connected track segment independently
Smoke particles spawn from each train
Speed slider affects all trains equally
Per-train headlights in night mode

tasks.title: Collision detection
tasks.description: After each frame, check if any two active (non-crashed) trains occupy the same cell. If so, trigger crash animation for both with collision SFX and fun toast.
acceptance: Two trains meeting on same cell triggers crash animation
Both trains show crash effects
Fun collision toast message displayed
All trains stop after any collision

tasks.title: Update persistence for multi-train
tasks.description: serializeState saves trains array. deserializeState handles both old format (train + cars) and new format (trains array). Save slots and auto-save updated. renderThumbnail shows multiple colored train dots.
acceptance: New saves use trains array format
Old saves (single train) load correctly, migrated to trains array
Save slot thumbnails show colored dots for each train
Auto-save/auto-load preserves all trains

testing_focus: Place 3 trains on different track segments, all animate simultaneously
Each train can have independent car attachments (up to 5 each)
Collision between two trains triggers crash animation for both
Old saves (single train format) load correctly and migrate
Random generator places one red train
Remove individual trains via right-click or drag-to-trash
Speed slider affects all trains equally
Night mode headlight works for all active trains
Smoke particles spawn for all active trains during play
Loop celebration triggers per-train when a train completes a loop
Crash at dead-end works per-train (other trains continue)
Cars render behind correct locomotive in static view
